patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException is likely caused by an attempt to dereference 'mapping' or 'values' when they are null or improperly initialized.
patches.changes: Add null checks for 'mapping' and 'values' before accessing them.
patches.fixed_method:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if (mapping == null || values == null) {
        return map;
    }
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}
patches.diff: Add null checks for 'mapping' and 'values' before accessing them.

patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException is likely due to `mapping` being null when there is no header in the CSV file.
patches.changes: - Added a null check for `mapping` before the for-loop
patches.fixed_method:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if (mapping == null || mapping.isEmpty()) {
        return map;
    }
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}
patches.diff: - Added a null check for `mapping` before the for-loop

patches.hypothesis: The method assumes 'mapping' is never null, leading to a NullPointerException. It needs a check to handle possible null 'mapping'.
patches.changes: + Check if mapping is null before iterating over it.
patches.fixed_method:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if (mapping != null) {
        for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
            final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
            if (col < values.length) {
                map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
            }
        }
    }
    return map;
}
patches.diff: + Check if mapping is null before iterating over it.

patches.hypothesis: The code attempts to populate a map from a mapping entry set but fails with NullPointerException, likely due to the mapping being null when headers are missing.
patches.fixed_method:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if (mapping == null || mapping.isEmpty()) return map;
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}

patches.hypothesis: NullPointerException occurs because `mapping` is null when header is not present in CSV, causing iteration over a null value.
patches.changes: - Add null check for `mapping` before iterating
patches.fixed_method:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
    if (mapping == null) {
        return map;
    }
    for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
        final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
        if (col < values.length) {
            map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
        }
    }
    return map;
}
patches.diff: - Add null check for `mapping` before iterating
